lyrics.text: One I love, two she loves
Three she's true to me
All of my friends fell out with me
Because I kept your company
lyrics.translation: 只因为我与你一直在一起

lyrics.text: But let them say whatever they will
I love my love with a free good will
lyrics.translation: 我以自由美好的意愿爱着你

lyrics.text: One I love, two she loves
And three she's true to me
They tell me he's poor,
they tell me he's young
I tell them all to hold their tongue
lyrics.translation: 我则告诉他们管好自己的言语

lyrics.text: If they could part the sand from the sea
lyrics.translation: 如果他们可以将沙砾从大海中分离

lyrics.text: They never could part my love from me
lyrics.translation: 那么他们就能将我对你的爱从我的身体里拆散

lyrics.text: One I love, two she loves
Three she's true to me
When I'm awake, I find no rest
lyrics.translation: 我醒来的时候，我发现我根本没有休息

lyrics.text: Until his head lies on my breast
lyrics.translation: 直到他的头躺在我胸口

lyrics.text: When I'm asleep I'm dreaming of
lyrics.translation: 我睡着了, 在我的梦里

lyrics.text: My own, my dear, my one true love
lyrics.translation: 我的,我亲爱的,我唯一的真爱

lyrics.text: One I love, two she loves
Three she's true to me
When the fire to ice will run
lyrics.translation: 当冰雪遇到火焰而融化

lyrics.text: And when the tide no longer turns
And when the rocks melt with the sun
My love for you will have just begun
lyrics.translation: 我对你的爱才刚刚开始

lyrics.text: One I love, two she loves
Three she's true to me
One I love, two she loves
And three she's true to me
